commands.review_summary:
The PR clears pending-final delivery bookkeeping before honoring a late post-send abort and adds focused regression coverage for the delivered-final race.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +50. Total +55 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can send a final reply and then check the abort signal before clearing pending-final state. I did not run a live gateway timing repro in this read-only review.

target.title: test: prefer auto-cleaning temp dir helper
target.body:
## Summary
- add `useTempDirTracker()` to `test/helpers/temp-dir.ts`, with Vitest-owned automatic cleanup after each test and no exposed `cleanup()` method
- keep the existing lower-level temp-dir helpers for historical unmigrated tests, while warning on new diff lines that import or call `makeTempDir`, `cleanupTempDirs`, or `createTempDirTracker`
- keep the positive migration sample small by moving two script tests to `useTempDirTracker()`
- update the testing guide and reporter tests for the new negative/positive CI warning behavior

## Verification
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run test/scripts/report-test-temp-creations.test.ts test/helpers/temp-dir.test.ts src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts test/scripts/parallels-package-log-progress-extract.test.ts test/scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.test.ts`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH pnpm tsgo:test`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/report-test-temp-creations.mjs --base origin/main --head HEAD --json` -> `[]`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH pnpm exec oxfmt --check scripts/report-test-temp-creations.mjs test/scripts/report-test-temp-creations.test.ts test/helpers/temp-dir.ts test/helpers/temp-dir.test.ts src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts test/scripts/parallels-package-log-progress-extract.test.ts test/scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.test.ts docs/help/testing.md`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- CI on `91b78eb6b8154a2840e2b0f5fb0a8bd9878ddea1`: `check-guards`, `check-test-types`, `check-lint`, `check-docs`, `checks-node-core-tooling`, and `checks-node-core-tooling-docker` passed; `check-guards` annotations are `[]`
